text:
EXPLANATION: The paper "Voting by Axioms" by Marie Christin Schmidtlein and Ulle Endriss is confirmed to exist, published in the Proceedings of the 22nd International Conference on Autonomous Agents and Multiagent Systems (AAMAS-2023), with a dedicated ACM page and the official IFAAMAS proceedings PDF. The title, authors, venue, and year all match exactly.
LINK: https://dl.acm.org/doi/10.5555/3545946.3598880
FOUND_TITLE: Voting by Axioms
FOUND_AUTHORS: Marie Christin Schmidtlein, Ulle Endriss
FOUND_YEAR: 2023
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
